source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Geist for premium operational UI with Noto Sans guidance for Japanese labels, measured headings, and calm numeric rhythm.
layout: Faceted 8px grids, low-radius crystal panels, translucent overlays, thin mineral borders, grounded shadows, and precise dashboard composition.

prompts.label: Transparent Smoky Quartz motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Smoky Quartz transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated smoky quartz crystal cluster for a design-system catalog, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A grounded premium smoky quartz specimen from an alpine pocket: clear prismatic crystal points with transparent smoke-brown interiors, dark root shadows, pale clear crystal edges, subtle internal veils, natural fractured facets, crisp mineral geometry, no loose smoke or mist.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; show a compact cluster with several vertical points and one lower anchoring base, no cropping.
Lighting/mood: controlled studio light, premium mineral specimen, sharp faceted highlights, brown gray shadow depth, clear-glass refractions, accurate quartz terminations.
Chroma-key background: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for background removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges and generous padding. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no amethyst purple, no citrine yellow, no generic gemstone icon, no jewelry setting, no hand, no landscape, no text, no watermark, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no second object.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive LIGHT-MODE design-system board for "Morphous Smoky Quartz" / "Smoky Quartz", source reference for a shadcn/tweakcn theme.
Motif source: smoky quartz from an alpine pocket, transparent smoke-brown crystal points, clear glass facets, charcoal internal shadows, pale crystal highlights, grounded premium mineral mood.
Palette to use consistently: Clear Veil #f6f1e8, Crystal Ink #201b17, Smoky Topaz #8a6b52, Alpine Lichen #7b866c, Facet Amber #b8905e, Frosted Crystal #d9d0c1, Pocket Stone #c5b8a5, Shadow Quartz #5a493f, Deep Inclusion #2f2925.
Board layout: high-resolution editorial product UI board with large readable labels. Include palette swatches, typography guidance for English and Japanese, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture sample, icon style, navigation, dashboard/data cards, forms, input/select/textarea, checkbox/radio/switch, tabs, badges, alerts, table, command/search, empty/error/loading states, and example application surface.
Visual language: grounded premium system, faceted crystal panel cuts, translucent smoky overlays, thin mineral vein borders, clear highlight strokes, warm smoke-brown primary actions, stone-neutral surfaces, amber focus rings, lichen secondary support. Use crisp component geometry with 8px radius or less.
Text constraints: all visible text must be large, legible, correctly spelled, and minimal; include English and Japanese headings but avoid tiny token tables.
Exclude: amethyst purple, neon colors, generic blue/purple gradients, jewelry branding, random logos, unrelated saturated colors, misspellings, watermarks.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 3840x2160 design-system board
Primary request: Create one wide 16:9 comprehensive DARK-MODE design-system board for "Morphous Smoky Quartz" / "Smoky Quartz", translated from the same smoky quartz motif and light-mode system.
Motif source: smoky quartz from an alpine pocket, transparent smoke-brown crystal points, clear glass facets, charcoal internal shadows, pale crystal highlights, subtle alpine mineral context, grounded premium mineral mood.
Palette to use consistently: Deep Inclusion #2f2925, Crystal Ink #201b17, Clear Veil #f6f1e8, Smoky Topaz #8a6b52, Alpine Lichen #7b866c, Facet Amber #b8905e, Frosted Crystal #d9d0c1, Pocket Stone #c5b8a5, Shadow Quartz #5a493f.
Board layout: high-resolution editorial product UI board with large readable labels. Include palette swatches, typography guidance for English and Japanese, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, texture sample, icon style, navigation, dashboard/data cards, forms, input/select/textarea, checkbox/radio/switch, tabs, badges, alerts, table, command/search, empty/error/loading states, and example application surface.
Visual language: grounded premium dark system, charcoal crystal-cavity background, faceted smoky panels, translucent quartz overlays, thin clear highlight strokes, warm smoke-brown primary actions, amber focus rings, lichen secondary support, pale crystal text, premium mineral depth. Use crisp component geometry with 8px radius or less.
Text constraints: all visible text must be large, legible, correctly spelled, and minimal; include English and Japanese headings but avoid tiny token tables.
Exclude: amethyst purple, neon colors, generic blue/purple gradients, jewelry branding, random logos, unrelated saturated colors, misspellings, watermarks.
